name: Lululemon Athletica Inc.
description: Lululemon Athletica Inc. is a prominent multinational athletic apparel retailer that specializes in high-performance clothing for yoga, running, training, and other fitness activities. Founded in 1998 in Vancouver, Canada, the company has grown into a global lifestyle brand known for its technical fabrics and functional designs. While headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, the company is incorporated in Delaware, United States. Lululemon offers a wide range of apparel, footwear, and accessories designed to support a healthy, active lifestyle, maintaining a strong presence in both physical retail stores and digital commerce platforms worldwide.
